languages.original_text: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."

languages.text: "Они — истинные сыны Неумирающего. Даже в столь плачевном положении их души кричат в дарованной Им ярости, а тела... застыли, скованные муками. Скорбная участь для самоотверженных и доблестных воинов, Домин. Негоже оставлять их, не даровав избавления".
languages.translation_comment: Found Kriegs in the Trazyn Museum (an exhibit with them)

"They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."

languages.text: 「彼らは不死の者の真の息子たちだ。こんな哀れな姿でさえ、彼ら魂は彼らに与えられた怒りの叫びを上げ、彼らの体は…苦しみの中で凍り付いている。献身と勇気ある戦士たちへの哀れな運命だ、ドミナス。彼らを救済する前に、見捨ててはならない」
languages.original_text: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."

traits.locale_text: 「彼らは不死の者の真の息子たちだ。こんな哀れな姿でさえ、彼ら魂は彼らに与えられた怒りの叫びを上げ、彼らの体は…苦しみの中で凍り付いている。献身と勇気ある戦士たちへの哀れな運命だ、ドミナス。彼らを救済する前に、見捨ててはならない。」

languages.text: « Ce sont de véritables fils de l'Immortel. Malgré leur état pitoyable, la rage qu'Il leur a conférée fait hurler leurs âmes, tandis que leurs corps sont... figés dans le tourment. Un sort bien triste pour des guerriers dévoués et vaillants, Domin. Nous ne pouvons pas partir sans leur accorder la délivrance. »
languages.original_text: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."

traits.locale_text: « Ce sont de véritables fils de l'Immortel. Malgré leur état pitoyable, la rage qu'Il leur a conférée fait hurler leurs âmes, tandis que leurs corps sont... figés dans le tourment. Un sort bien triste pour des guerriers dévoués et vaillants, Domin. Nous ne pouvons pas partir sans leur accorder la délivrance. »

languages.text: "Sie sind wahre Söhne des Todlosen. Selbst in einem so erbärmlichen Zustand schreien ihre Seelen mit der Wut auf, die Er ihnen auferlegt hat, während ihre Leiber ... in ihrer Qual erstarrt sind. Ein leidvolles Schicksal für entschlossene und tapfere Krieger, Domin. Es wäre falsch, sie zu verlassen, ohne ihnen zuvor Erlösung zu gewähren."
languages.original_text: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."

traits.locale_text: "Sie sind wahre Söhne des Todlosen. Selbst in einem so erbärmlichen Zustand schreien ihre Seelen mit der Wut auf, die Er ihnen auferlegt hat, während ihre Leiber ... in ihrer Qual erstarrt sind. Ein leidvolles Schicksal für entschlossene und tapfere Krieger, Domin. Es wäre falsch, sie zu verlassen, ohne ihnen zuvor Erlösung zu gewähren."

languages.text: "Onlar, Ölmeyen'in gerçek oğulları. Böylesine acınası bir durumda bile ruhları O'nun bahşettiği öfkeyle haykırıyor, bedenleri ise... İşkence içinde donup kalmış. Adanmış ve cesur savaşçılar için kederli bir kader Domin. Onlara kurtuluş bahşetmeden gitmek yanlış olur."
languages.original_text: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."

traits.locale_text: "Onlar, Ölmeyen'in gerçek oğulları. Böylesine acınası bir durumda bile ruhları O'nun bahşettiği öfkeyle haykırıyor, bedenleri ise... İşkence içinde donup kalmış. Adanmış ve cesur savaşçılar için kederli bir kader Domin. Onlara kurtuluş bahşetmeden gitmek yanlış olur."

languages.text: «Son auténticos hijos del Inmortal. Incluso en su penoso estado, sus almas gritan con la furia que Él les otorgó, pero sus cuerpos están... congelados en un tormento eterno. Un aciago destino para unos guerreros tan valientes y abnegados, Domin. No deberíamos marcharnos sin concederles primero la liberación de la muerte».
languages.original_text: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."

traits.locale_text: «Son auténticos hijos del Inmortal. Incluso en su penoso estado, sus almas gritan con la furia que Él les otorgó, pero sus cuerpos están... congelados en un tormento eterno. Un aciago destino para unos guerreros tan valientes y abnegados, Domin. No deberíamos marcharnos sin concederles primero la liberación de la muerte».

languages.text: “他们的确是不死之神真正的子嗣。即使身陷如此悲惨的境地，他们的灵魂仍在祂所赐予的狂怒中嘶吼，而他们的身躯却……凝固在苦痛之中。对于这些忠诚勇猛的战士而言，这是多么悲惨的命运啊，秘者。若不给予他们解脱便离去，实为不义。”
languages.original_text: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."
